escalation.rationale: Trump cancels Memorial Day plans and places military on standby amid reports of preparing fresh Iran strikes.

ticker_items: Trump cuts short NJ trip, military on standby for potential Iran strikes
Oil facilities in Novorossiysk on fire after Ukrainian drone attack
Pakistan army chief arrives in Tehran for US-Iran mediation
Norway enters 'total defence' mode amid Russia threat
Tulsi Gabbard resigns as US intelligence chief

eastern_europe.description: Drone attack on oil facilities in Russia's key Black Sea port causes fire.

middle_east.description: Israeli strikes kill six paramedics and a child despite ceasefire agreement.

middle_east.text: Major gaps remain in US talks
middle_east.speaker: Tehran officials
middle_east.title: Iranian government

middle_east.text: US demands for ending war are excessive
middle_east.speaker: Tehran
middle_east.title: Iranian government

observers.description: Army chief Asim Munir arrives in Tehran for US-Iran mediation efforts. Pakistan has deployed 8,000 troops and military assets to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty.
Enters 'total defence' mode in response to Russia threat, upgrading air raid shelters and increasing civil defense personnel. Government urging citizens to stock emergency supplies for potential war.
Reports indicate China secretly trained Russian troops who have since fought in Ukraine. Xi Jinping planning visit to North Korea to revive US denuclearization talks.

financial.notes: Global energy crisis continues with supply disruptions from Iran war affecting energy security.

update_log.text: Trump returns to White House early as US military placed on standby for potential Iran strikes.
Pakistani army chief arrives in Tehran as mediation efforts intensify between US and Iran.
Oil facilities in Novorossiysk on fire following overnight Ukrainian drone attack.
Tulsi Gabbard announces resignation as US intelligence chief over Iran war disagreements.
